message:
feat(engine): massive enrichment expansion — tail latency control plane and 100+ test suites

Source module expansions (15+ modules):
- baseline_interpreter, contextual_policy_selector,
  execution_orchestrator, frankenlab_harness_migration,
  hindsight_boundary_capture, hostcall_batch_transport,
  hybrid_lane_router, ifc_provenance_index, ir_contract, lib.rs,
  lowering_pipeline, regime_signature_feature, simd_morsel_kernel,
  stdlib, tail_latency_control_plane

New enrichment/integration test suites (100+ files):
- Covers counterfactual intervention, cross repo contract,
  cx threading, declassification pipeline, delegate cell harness,
  ir contract, optional chain member lowering, and dozens more

Gate infrastructure updates:
- tail_latency_control_plane docs and runner
- optional_chain_member_lowering suite runner

Beads tracker: sync issue state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

+            finally_label: None,

         Ir1Op::EndTry,
         Ir1Op::Pop,
         Ir1Op::ForInInit,
